text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, on a visit to the training<n>track...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to go, Doto? I'll get<n>right into
reading your fortune.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, please do... Um, I'd like to learn<n>about my
racing fortune...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Very well! Let's get to divining!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fortune telling, here we go! Hum, hee,<n>ho!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Gods, goddesses, and the<n>great
Fukukitaru... Please, please<n>bless me with great
fortune...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...F-Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-th-that look on your face... Does<n>that mean
my fortune is—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Misfortune awaits you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh noooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But depending on your actions, great<n>fortune is in
the cards...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, where'd she go?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaaahh! I knew it... I always mess<n>things up,
no matter what I do!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto runs off in an incredible<n>flurry...
down the 2,000-meter turf<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She rounds off the first corner, then<n>the second,
and as she's heading<n>toward the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, no, nooo! What do we do?!<n>Who shall
save this wayward<n>Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaah?! Are you perhaps—a divine<n>
messenger?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, explainer, I don't care!<n>Please, show me
the way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A fortune cannot go partially heard!<n>How do I get
the message across to<n>Doto?
choice_data_list: I think you should just wait here.
Grab her attention with a big yell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait?! You expect me to sit and wait<n>for destiny
to do its bidding?! With<n>Doto already gone?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: She's running around the track...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
She's past the third corner... and is<n>coming back
this way?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Phew. I-I'mexhausted...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now's our chance! Pin her down!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Fukukitaru?! But how—why?!<n>Did you
just teleport?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto finally listens to her<n>fortune in full,
after running a lap<n>around the track.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! But Doto has already run<n>off so far!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if any amount of yelling<n>will reach
her now...
choice_data_list: You won't know until you try.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I take the opportunity to relay a secret<n>technique
to Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack... You know what, I'll just do it!Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
IF GREAT FORTUNE YOU WOULD<n>FIND! GATHER
WHERE MINE FINGER<n>GUIDES!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You really came?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well, who doesn't want to be<n>blessed with
great fortune?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I know something good will happen<n>in the
future, I think I can muster up<n>some confidence in
myself...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I just need an extra push, a sign that<n>even
someone as useless as me can<n>make things
happen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Hm. Yes, indeed. I foresee great<n>things
happening in your future.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-really?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But of course! Because in truth, great<n>fortune
awaits!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's deep yearning to find<n>confidence
resonates strongly with<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's not working!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Kyah! This calls for an all-out attack!<n>Everyone,
let's all band together to<n>capture Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the combined powers of random<n>passersby,
we chase after Meisho<n>Doto...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! I'm fully surrounded?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-h-help me, pleeeeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I'm completely...worn out...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This isn't just bad luck—it's terrible<n>luck!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We somehow manage to capture the<n>very
exhausted Meisho Doto...
